context: Small talk starts with how you feel. This scenario gives you the highest-use daily states so your conversations sound natural right away.
explanation: Use two patterns: estoy + state (estoy cansado, estoy feliz) and tengo + need (tengo hambre, tengo sed). This contrast is more useful than memorizing isolated adjectives.

examples.note: Use cansada if you are female.
Use ocupada if you are female.
feliz does not change for gender.
Spanish uses tener for physical needs.
One sentence can mix both patterns.
